summary: Iteration 2 - Friends system + social quests + relationship bars fully tested. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed (friend-code gen, request/accept/decline, duplicate rejection, friends list with relationship=50, profile 403 for strangers/200 for friends, assign-quest-to-friend, pending->accepted->completed flow with relationship +max(1,xp//5) and XP awarded to RECIPIENT's skill, decline drops rel, auto-expire past-deadline quests, skill must belong to recipient, self-quest still works, unfriend). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): registered 2 users via API, logged in as Alice via UI, verified my-friend-code matches API (NO2SRW), sent friend request to Bob using friend-code-input + send-friend-request-button, Bob accepted via API, friend-<id> card tappable, friend profile screen shows character name (BobUI), #QQ17A0 code, 50/100 RELATIONSHIP bar, LV chip, all 6 VITAL_STATS bars, skills list with Fitness, ASSIGN QUEST and UNFRIEND buttons. Assign quest modal works: title/xp/deadline inputs accepted, SEND created quest that API confirms. Profile tab shows profile-friend-code.

issues: No bottom tab bar on friend detail route (expected - it's outside (tabs) group). Back button works via friend-back-button.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning persists: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - non-blocking RNW internal.

action_items: None blocking. All iteration-2 acceptance criteria met.
critical_code_review_comments: Relationship math uses max(1, xp_reward // 5) consistently in both decline and complete paths; delta clamped 0-100 via adjust_relationship.
auto_expire_quests correctly iterates past-deadline pending/accepted quests in GET /quests and applies -delta to friendship relationship.
serialize_quest exposes owner_user_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, deadline, assignment_status - enough for frontend filtering (mine / from-friends / sent).
Assign-quest sets user_id=recipient, so recipient can complete via existing /quests/{id}/complete logic; skill XP awarded to recipient_id which equals user['id'] (the completer).
friend_code index is unique+sparse; generation loop collision-safe.
Only the recipient can accept (requested_by != user enforces that Alice can't accept her own outgoing - verified 403 in tests).

Unfriend deletes the friendship doc but DOES NOT cascade-clean pending/in-flight friend-quests; an orphaned quest with to_user_id=ex-friend and from_user_id=me can still exist. Consider mitigating in a future iteration (low priority).

DELETE /api/quests allows deletion by user_id, to_user_id, or from_user_id - recipient could delete a friend-quest mid-flight bypassing decline flow (no relationship hit). Consider restricting for friend quests.
server.py now 836 lines - approaching 700-line soft-limit; consider splitting friends/ and quests/ into submodules next iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (friend-code, send-request, accept, friend profile view, assign quest modal)

seed_data_creation: Created throwaway users uitest_<rand>@nexus.com and test_<uuid>@nexus.com via /api/auth/register. Left in DB (isolated, no PII).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL env = EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Admin: admin@nexus.com/admin123. Friend flow: POST /api/friends/request {code}, GET /api/friends/requests returns {incoming,outgoing}, POST /api/friends/requests/{id}/accept|decline, GET /api/friends. Assign quest: POST /api/friends/{friend_id}/quests {title,xp_reward,to_user_id,deadline(ISO or null),skill_id(of recipient)}. Quest lifecycle for friend quest: pending->accepted->completed|declined|expired. Frontend testIDs: my-friend-code, friend-code-input, send-friend-request-button, accept-<reqid>, decline-<reqid>, friend-<userid>, assign-quest-button, assign-title-input, assign-xp-input, assign-deadline-input, assign-quest-confirm, unfriend-button, filter-mine|from-friends|sent, accept-quest-<id>, decline-quest-<id>, complete-quest-<id>. Friend detail route is /friend/[id] outside (tabs) so no bottom-tab bar there - use friend-back-button to return.
rca_of_issue: No blocking issues. One playwright navigation flake at end (tried to click PROFILE tab while still on /friend/[id] which has no tab bar) - test harness issue, not a bug.
